primary.usage: Logo background, empanada crust motif, badge border, primary brand color

secondary.usage: Heading text (EMPANADAS, DIPS, CHURROS, COMBOS), maple leaf accent, CTA buttons, underline accents

accent.usage: Darker red for hover states and combo card borders

main.usage: Page background — clean white, Squarespace default body bg

alternate.usage: Warm cream section backgrounds for alternating content areas

card.usage: Card surfaces, combo cards with red borders

borders.usage: Combo card borders, section dividers, accent lines under headings

colorPalette.overallTheme: light-clean with bold yellow and red brand accents — bgMain source: Squarespace default white body background, confirmed via rgba(255,255,255,1) in site CSS and white page rendering across all 4 pages analyzed

headingFont.style: bold-display — closest Google Fonts match to Latinito's bold uppercase italic display headings (EMPANADAS, DIPS, CHURROS, COMBOS) which use a compressed, high-impact sans-serif with strong Latin flavor

bodyFont.style: clean-friendly — closest match to Squarespace system sans-serif stack used on site body text, warm and rounded for a family-friendly food brand

messagingPatterns.headlines: Short and punchy — bold uppercase single words or short phrases
messagingPatterns.ctas: Direct command — Order Now, Come Try Something New
messagingPatterns.descriptions: Benefit-focused — emphasizing freshness, daily preparation, and authenticity

sampleCaptions: So Good, One Just Isn't Enough!
Come Try Something New! We welcome everyone to visit our takeout spot at 860 North Park Dr. in Brampton
Try our CLASSIC CHURROS paired with our homemade dipping sauces!

commonPraise: best in the Greater Toronto Area

contentStrategy.valueProposition: Fresh, authentic South American empanadas made daily in Brampton — introducing Latin American comfort food to Canada since 2020
keyMessages: So Good, One Just Isn't Enough!
Fresh dough made daily, cooked to order
Halal beef and chicken options available
Catering for events — trusted by SickKids, Toyota, Cargill

imageStrategy.primarySubjects: food products — empanadas, churros, dips, combos
imageStrategy.composition: product close-ups on white backgrounds, infographic-style menu boards

food.description: Empanadas menu board — all 8 varieties (Carne, Pollo, Chorizo, Tuna Cheddar, Ham Swiss, Corn Havarti, Queso, Veggie Sazon) with cross-section photos and prices
Dipping sauces menu — Latino, Chimichurri, Picante, Chipotle Lime, Chocolate, Dulce de Leche at $0.75 each
Churros menu — Cinnamon, Vanilla, Coconut flavors with pricing (Single $1.99, Triple $5.49, Dozen $19.99)
Combo deals menu board — 6 combo options from $9.99 to $52.99 Fiesta pack

people.name: Matthew
people.bio: Matthew has enjoyed cooking and watching his mother prepare many South American dishes since he was a child. His favourite food has always been empanadas, and the thought that many people in Ontario have never even heard of them inspired him to start an empanada business.

people.name: Graciela
people.bio: Graciela moved to Canada from Paraguay. She inspired Matthew's love of South American cuisine and together they made Latinito Empanadas a reality.

reviews.text: The empanadas were amazing, fresh ingredients. Try every empanada you will not be disappointed.
A friend brought me to Latinito Empanadas, saying they were one of the best in the Greater Toronto Area. After trying them, I have to agree!

The empanadas are fried per order, so they come out hot and crispy. I am truly in love with their Corn Havarti empanadas, and their chimichurri salsa is delicious, adding a tangy and fresh flavor. I will definitely come back, and I will be telling all my friends about this hidden gem in Brampton.
Decided to uber eats some empanadas on a night in and we were obsessed with how AMAZING they tasted!!!!
This place is a hidden gem in Brampton. We went for ice cream next door and thought we should try it.
My first time having empanadas and they were AMAZING! Loved the quick service and the many options to choose from.
Great empanadas, would recommend and will come back, beef is good and all other options we tried were great.

archetype.rationale: Latinito is a takeout empanada shop where foot traffic and neighborhood identity matter — menu, hours, and address are the primary conversion drivers. Content priority leads with menu.
